description: The image presents a stark contrast between two rectangular objects, one black and one white, set against a dark gray background. The black object, positioned to the left of the frame, is larger than its counterpart on the right. The white object, smaller in size, is located towards the center of the image. Despite their difference in size and color, both objects maintain an equal distance from each other, creating a sense of balance within the composition. The simplicity of the elements and the absence of any text or action suggest that this could be a minimalist art piece.
